title: Breathtaking Premium Editorial Infographic Poster 16:9

imagePrompts.prompt: A breathtaking premium editorial infographic poster in 16:9 horizontal format about the human nervous system, designed in a stunning neon bioluminescence style completely unlike any previous poster, with a deep void-black background and a glowing central composition showing a fully transparent human silhouette rendered in delicate luminous blue-white lines, the brain glowing in electric violet, the spinal cord pulsing in cyan, and the nerve network branching across the entire body like a galaxy of light threads in turquoise, electric blue and soft magenta, each nerve path glowing as if lit from within, the composition floating in darkness like an X-ray from the future; surrounding the glowing figure a constellation of labeled pointer lines in thin white connecting to elegant dark glass fact panels on both sides, left side panel showing fact blocks BRAIN WEIGHT, NERVE SPEED, NEURONS, CENTRAL SYSTEM, PERIPHERAL SYSTEM, and REFLEXES in clean white sans-serif on frosted dark glass cards with subtle cyan glow borders, right side a DID YOU KNOW? panel on the same frosted glass style with five stunning original neurological facts, at the top a large title THE HUMAN NERVOUS SYSTEM in luminous white bold modern sans-serif font with the subtitle YOUR BODY'S UNIVERSE in small electric cyan tracking, the entire composition is cinematic, scientific, breathtaking, futuristic, unlike anything seen before, completely original, no copyrighted content, no logos, no pop-culture references, 16:9 horizontal ratio
